homepage.title: Build AI Persona
homepage.subtitle: Import interview records, analyze completeness, and generate interactive AI Personas for your research and analysis needs.
homepage.ctaDescription: Upload your first interview and discover deep insights about your personas.
homepage.followUpDescription: Generate targeted questions and collect additional data through shareable interview links
homepage.smartQuestionGeneration: Smart question generation based on analysis gaps
homepage.importDescription: Upload PDF interview records and convert them to structured, LLM-compatible format
homepage.upgradeToMaxPlan: Please upgrade to MAX plan to use this feature
homepage.chatDescription: Interact with generated AI Personas based on your interview data
homepage.researchDescription: Advanced research tools and analytics powered by AI Persona data
homepage.dimensionsDescription: Our system evaluates interview completeness across seven key socio-psychological dimensions
homepage.demographicDescription: Basic information, life cycle stage, and social identity analysis including age, education, occupation, and background.
homepage.geographicDescription: Living environment, regional culture influences, and migration experience impact on behaviors.
homepage.psychologicalDescription: Core values, personality traits, life attitudes, and interests that drive behavior patterns.
homepage.behavioralDescription: Purchase behavior, usage habits, media contact, and consumption patterns analysis.
homepage.needsDescription: Core needs, latent requirements, usage scenarios, and current challenges faced by users.
homepage.techDescription: Digital proficiency, device usage, innovation adoption willingness, and technology trust levels.
homepage.socialDescription: Social circles, influence networks, word-of-mouth behaviors, and group belonging patterns.
homepage.gettingStartedDescription: Follow these simple steps to create your first AI Persona
homepage.step1Description: Start by uploading a PDF containing your interview transcripts or records.
homepage.step2Description: Examine the completeness scores and identify areas that need additional information.
homepage.step3Description: AI generates targeted questions based on analysis gaps. Share interview links with participants for additional data collection.
homepage.step4Description: Create an interactive AI Persona and start chatting with it to validate insights.
homepage.step5Description: Interview AI Personas in advanced research scenarios and analytics workflows.
homepage.uploadFileFirst: Please upload a PDF file first

personas.title: My AI Personas
personas.subtitle: Manage and interact with your generated AI Personas
personas.createNewPersonas: Create new AI Personas from interview data

personaChat.confirmClearHistory: Are you sure you want to clear all chat history? This action cannot be undone.
personaChat.clearFailed: Failed to clear history, please try again

personaDetails.title: AI Persona Details
personaDetails.description: View the detailed profile of this AI Persona

followUpInterview.followUpInterviewDescription: Conduct in-depth supplementary interview based on analysis results
followUpInterview.thankYou: Thank you for participating in this interview session. Your responses have been recorded and will be used for research purposes.
followUpInterview.summaryNote: The interview summary and analysis will be available to the researcher shortly.

SharePersonaButton.title: Share Persona
SharePersonaButton.shareTipMessage: Use this link to access the persona or copy it to share with others:
SharePersonaButton.openInstructions: You can also click "Open" below to view it in a new tab.

import.title: AI Persona Generation
import.processingError: An error occurred while processing the file:
import.confirmReanalyze: Are you sure you want to re-analyze? This will overwrite existing analysis results.

analysisResult.title: Completeness Analysis Results
analysisResult.excellentCoverage: Excellent coverage across dimensions, comprehensive and in-depth information
analysisResult.goodCoverage: Good coverage, some dimensions can be further optimized
analysisResult.baselineCoverage: Coverage meets baseline, key information needs to be supplemented
analysisResult.belowBaseline: Coverage below baseline, extensive supplementation needed across dimensions

supplementaryQuestions.title: Comprehensive Supplementary Questions
supplementaryQuestions.shareDescription: Send this link to interviewees to collect answers to supplementary questions
supplementaryQuestions.shareNote: Interviewees can view questions and provide answers through this link
supplementaryQuestions.createShareNote: Create a link to send to interviewees for collecting supplementary answers
